title: Smart Fridge Status Update
text:
## Smart Fridge Status Update

**Device:** Kitchen Fridge firmware {number}.{number}

**Notification:** Your {adjective} yogurt has achieved {emotion} and may attempt to {verb}.

**Inventory warning:** Low on {food}, high on {plural noun}, suspiciously full of {color} leftovers.

**Suggested action:** Ask {person} to remove the {object} before it starts {verb ending in -ing}.

**Voice assistant note:** The fridge heard a {sound} near the {place} and responded {adverb}.

**Warranty status:** Still technically {adjective}.
